## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      4 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 15, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Thomas Andrews_, Jul 18, 2026, 2/5: "It continues to exit out the conversation and completely crash. I have to start the conversation again after ads interrupt my typing. I've even lost characters behind this. It continues to do this even after reinstalling the app! This is highly annoying. You keep saying updates... but it really only gets worse. I used to like this app. Not so much anymore. I'm giving hope, but I'm ready to delete my entire account period now. I'll give it a few! Then it takes thirty minutes to respond."
            2. _Nehir_, Jul 15, 2026, 4/5: "I LOVE HOW MUCH MEMORY IT HAS but there's not many great characters and slow response"

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      2 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 17, 2026 - Jul 17, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Sabrina Smith_, Jul 17, 2026, 1/5: "I started to use the app a year ago, it was great, I loved to make characters and be part of the community. I paid premium inmediately so I didnt have experience with ads. BUT then the filters made the game unplayable. My bots (mainly male, fully clothed, no NSFW) Started getting banned and restricted. If I tried to fix them I had to pay diamonds and LOSE my whole history. Then I started getting ads even if I was paying no ads subscription.I ended up moving to emochi."
